title: Odysseus feature intake + personal communications additions
source_reference: https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus - documented from its public README only; NOT cloned, installed, or run.
note: Additions file kept separate from tool_candidate_registry.json so N+6.7B runs in parallel with N+6.7A. Every module is candidate_only: nothing here is installed, cloned, run, or wired into the runtime. Email/WhatsApp work is draft-only with no account login and no auto-send.

modules.name: Odysseus Feature Extraction
modules.value: Extract useful self-hosted AI-workspace patterns from Odysseus into Ghoti planning: chat with local/API models, agent-with-tools, a model/hardware cookbook, deep research reports, AI-council blind model compare, a document editor with AI assist, memory/skills, email triage, notes/tasks/reminders, calendar, mobile/PWA, local-first workspace UX, and bundled services (ChromaDB/SearXNG/ntfy-style).
modules.local_first_path: Read Odysseus's public README/docs; record the patterns as candidate-only modules here; everything stays local and documentation-only.
modules.external_service_path: None - this is documentation. Any future component is its own separately gated module with its own approval.
modules.first_safe_test: Summarize the Odysseus feature list from its public README into 14_context/tool_intake/odysseus_feature_intake.md; no clone, no install, no run.
stop_conditions: public exposure of an admin console without auth/HTTPS
forbidden_now: wire any component into the runtime

modules.name: AI Council / Model Compare
modules.value: Council-style blind comparison of multiple model answers to pick the best one; aligns with Ghoti's existing local/cheap-model routing (llama3.1:8b coordinator, gemma3:4b worker).
modules.local_first_path: Compare local Ollama models on loopback only (127.0.0.1:11434); blind labels; human picks the winner.
modules.external_service_path: API models may be added later, gated and approval-only, with keys supplied at run time and never stored in the repo or vault.
modules.first_safe_test: Spec a blind-compare format that reads two model outputs from local fixtures and presents them unlabeled; no live API; no key storage.

modules.name: Model Cookbook / Hardware Fit
modules.value: A cookbook mapping models to hardware fit (VRAM/RAM/CPU) so Ghoti only chooses models that actually run on the local machine.
modules.local_first_path: A static table of the approved local models and their resource needs; read-only reference.
modules.first_safe_test: Write a static cookbook table for the currently approved local models; no downloads, no installs.

modules.name: Deep Research Visual Reports
modules.value: Generate structured research reports (sections + visuals) from a query using local search plus local summarization, output as a Markdown draft.
modules.local_first_path: Local-first: an approved local search (SearXNG-style) plus a local summarizer; output a Markdown report draft the human reviews.
modules.external_service_path: External search APIs are gated and approval-only; keys are never stored; results are drafts, never auto-published.
modules.first_safe_test: Spec a report template and run a dry summarization over a local fixture corpus; no live web calls.
forbidden_now: scrape the live web without approval

modules.name: Document Editor for Project Documentation
modules.value: An AI-assisted editor for Ghoti's own project docs/memory: draft, revise, and summarize Markdown, always proposing a diff for human approval.
modules.local_first_path: Operate only on repo Markdown under approved folders; local-model assist; propose a diff; never auto-write.
modules.first_safe_test: Spec an editor that proposes a Markdown diff for a doc under 14_context/; the human applies it; the tool never auto-writes or commits.

modules.name: Email Triage + Reply Drafts
modules.value: Summaries, urgency scoring, tags, labeled reply DRAFTS, and spam flagging for email - to save time. Drafts only; the human sends.
modules.local_first_path: Operate on a local fixture mailbox (an exported sample) with a local model; produce summaries, tags, urgency, and labeled DRAFT replies as files.
modules.external_service_path: Real mailbox access is a separate, approved milestone using a provider's official API, read-only first, with credentials supplied at run time and never stored in the repo or vault.
modules.first_safe_test: Run triage over a local fixture of sample emails; output summaries, tags, urgency, and a labeled DRAFT reply; nothing is sent, deleted, archived, or moved.

modules.name: WhatsApp Summary + Reply Drafts
modules.value: Summarize chats and prepare labeled reply DRAFTS for WhatsApp - time-saving, never auto-sending. Drafts only; the human sends.
modules.local_first_path: Operate on a local fixture export of chats with a local model; output summaries and labeled DRAFT replies as files.
modules.external_service_path: Real WhatsApp access is blocked-adjacent and needs a separate, approved milestone; no login now; credentials never stored in the repo or vault.
modules.first_safe_test: Summarize a local fixture chat export and produce a labeled DRAFT reply; nothing is sent; no login.

modules.name: Calendar/Tasks/Reminders Agent
modules.value: Surface calendar events and manage tasks/reminders as drafts the user confirms before anything is written.
modules.local_first_path: Local task/reminder list files; propose additions; the user confirms; no external calendar write.
modules.external_service_path: External calendar sync is a separate, approved milestone via an official API, read-only first, with credentials supplied at run time and never stored.
modules.first_safe_test: Spec a local tasks/reminders file format and propose a draft event/reminder; the tool never auto-writes a real calendar.
stop_conditions: writing to a real calendar without approval

modules.name: Personal Style Memory
modules.value: An explicit, user-curated preference/style memory so drafts can sound like the user - always labeled DRAFT, always human-approved before any outbound. 'Thinks like me' without impersonation.
modules.local_first_path: An explicit preference-memory file the user can read, edit, and delete; drafts are written in the user's style and labeled DRAFT.
modules.external_service_path: None - the preference memory stays local.
modules.first_safe_test: Create an explicit, editable/deletable preference-memory schema; generate a labeled DRAFT in that style; require human approval for any outbound.
allowed_now: draft in the user's style labeled DRAFT
forbidden_now: build sensitive profiles without explicit approval

modules.name: AI Video Self-Editing Pipeline
modules.value: Assist editing the user's own videos (cuts, captions, draft edits) with a local-first pipeline; export drafts for manual upload by the user.
modules.local_first_path: A local pipeline over user-approved assets only; produce export drafts; the user uploads manually.
modules.external_service_path: Any cloud render or upload is a separate, approved milestone; there is no automated posting.
modules.first_safe_test: Spec a local edit pipeline over an approved sample asset and produce a draft export; no posting.
allowed_now: produce export drafts for manual upload
modules.implementation_phase: Phase 3 - local edit pipeline, manual upload
